title: Vaccine Administration | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
per vaccine administration is critical to ensuring vaccination is as safe and effective as possible. CDC recommends that all health care personnel who administer vaccines receive comprehensive, competency-based training on vaccine administration policies and procedures BEFORE administering vaccines. Use this page to direct you to best practices, trainings, and resources.
Guidance: Before, during, and after 
Vaccine Administration: Before Giving Vaccine 
Receive guidance on assessing, screening, and patient education before giving vaccines. 
Vaccine Administration: During Vaccination 
Get info on administration procedures including, preparation, site, route, needle length and more. 
Vaccine Administration: After Giving Vaccine 
Find information on vaccine disposal, documentation, reporting, and management of adverse events. 
Additional resources 
Vaccine Administration Resources 
A listing of resources that help health care providers with vaccine administration.
